title: Enchantment Tooltip Cleaner
description: Enchantment Tooltip Cleaner can remove enchantment lines and/or the gray description text beneath them.
body:
Enchantment Tooltip Cleaner can remove enchantment lines and/or the gray description text beneath them, perfectly resolving the conflict between **_[Apotheosis](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apotheosis)_** and **_[Tooltips Reforged](https://modrinth.com/mod/tooltips-reforged)_** and keeping your tooltips clean and tidy. Now, it's not just for enchantments; it's a complete, **Zero-Overhead** toolkit for tidying your tooltips!

**Features:**
- **Simple Toggles**: Easily remove common clutter like enchantments, descriptions, item attributes, and potion effects with a single click.
- **Advanced Filtering**: 5 powerful custom filter lists to remove absolutely any line you intuitively don't want to see:
  - Text (Contains / Exact Match)
  - Translation Key (Contains / Exact Match)
  - **Regex (Advanced Pattern Matching)**: Now fully independent and highly reliable. Filter out complex dynamic texts flawlessly!
- **Zero-Overhead Performance**: Newly reinvented rendering logic using global caching mechanisms and native format strippers. Even with massive filter configs during intense 144Hz tooltip rendering, it costs basically 0 CPU/Memory overhead.
- **Debug Mode**: A powerful debug tool (Hold `[Ctrl]` to copy info) makes it incredibly easy to find the exact text or key you need to filter.
- **Fully Configurable**: All features are configurable via the in-game Mod Menu or the `.toml` config file.

**Compatibility:**
- Now fully modernized and ported to **NeoForge 1.21.1**.
- Recommended for use: **_[Tooltips Reforged](https://modrinth.com/mod/tooltips-reforged)_** + **_[Enchantment Descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions)_**

----------------------------------------中文说明----------------------------------------

此 MOD 可以移除附魔行和/或其下方的灰色说明文字，完美解决 **_[Apotheosis](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apotheosis)_** 与 **_[Tooltips Reforged](https://modrinth.com/mod/tooltips-reforged)_** 的冲突，让你的提示框清爽干净。现在它不只针对附魔，它是一个完整且**零性能损耗**的提示框清理终极工具！

**功能特色：**
- **简单开关**： 通过简单的选项，一键隐藏附魔、灰色说明、物品属性和药水效果。
- **高级过滤**： 拥有5个强大的自定义过滤列表，让你能精准移除不想看到的任何特定行：
  - 文本 (包含 / 精准)
  - 翻译键 (包含 / 精准)
  - **正则表达式 (Regex 高级匹配)**：现在彻底修复并实现独立判断运行，任何动态的复杂文本都能被完美剔除！
- **极速零开销性能**： 底层渲染逻辑全新重构。全面引入全局极速缓存与原生样式剥离算法。即使你配置了超长的正则过滤列表并在高刷帧率下疯狂移动鼠标，也不会引起任何内存碎片卡顿。
- **调试模式**： 强大的调试工具（悬停时按住 `[Ctrl]` 即可复制信息），让你能极其轻松地揪出隐藏在游戏底层的特定文本或翻译键。
- **完全可配置**： 所有功能均可通过游戏内的 Mod 菜单或 `.toml` 配置文件进行热重载设置。

**兼容性更新：**
- 现已全面升级底层代码，完美支持 **NeoForge 1.21.1**！
- 推荐体验搭配： **_[Tooltips Reforged](https://modrinth.com/mod/tooltips-reforged)_** + **_[Enchantment Descriptions](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchantment-descriptions)_**
